{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603222022125B9D1BEDF980C693B23F"}"},"total":378},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7427977923683337022","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"怎么说呢，99%的美食+0.6%的剧情+0.4%的宗门。纯纯美食文！有一个美食辅助系统，不过感觉系统除了能给主角增加修为，也没什么用了，毕竟主角本来就是顶级大厨。它倒是能够坚持一直写美食，写到大结局，像别的小说只在前面加一个引导，后面慢慢的就变成了别的类型。我是完结了才开始看的，放的图片也挺多挺吸引的。最最主要的挺下饭啊，那么多写美食、做美食、吃美食的描写！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1729471075,"group_id":"7186658888798702630","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"评论就是我看书的见解，有什么问题赶紧问，时间久了就忘了。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzPMSKyKJhmnzjKLa9Vm4fcdCQq1ihodCREstOZagG9L","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/198c1af46f224e0182928d97b107225e~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776702308&x-signature=a4BMx1SzS6Ng21KLM0OSyPLUoqA%3D","user_id":"3940279817092941","user_name":"应该就是这样"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3940279817092941","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7186658888798702630","book_info":{"abstract":"玄幻，美食，配图，搞笑，老六，种田。
甜品颜值界的扛把子星空羊羹。
仰望星空派进阶版-死不瞑目。
颜值爆表的开水白菜。
谁来了都得胖几斤再走的麻辣小龙虾。
一只够几十人吃的剁椒鲲头。
红焖羊肉、鱼香肉丝、水晶虾饺、鸡汁小笼包、松鼠鳜鱼……
扶我起来，我还能再吃三斤。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2obad06daad1c6e57cae23bd45ae045f24~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"俺家有只小神兽","author_id":"","book_id":"7186658888798702630","book_name":"美食，我的美食馋哭诸天万界","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#a08878","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1647人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":258,"name":"传统玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=258&name=传统玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":80,"name":"剑道","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=80&name=剑道&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":78,"name":"美食","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=78&name=美食&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":69,"name":"直播","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=69&name=直播&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7189511004324102667","read_count":"1647","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1098948"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.9","serial_count":"536","tags":"传统玄幻,玄幻,系统,穿越,直播,美食,剑道,无女主,东方玄幻","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/7d2e7f90574856186235e73b3f6a47d0~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779366133&x-signature=rG6DXG%2FKTbBbwTHlVClFed4EmKY%3D","tomato_book_statu
